name: Phu Quoc Beach Escape 5 days
highlights: Have ample time to relax, sunbathe, and enjoy the beauty of the Phu Quoc coastline
Explore vibrant coral reefs and encounter diverse marine life in the famous surrounding islands
Visit this picturesque Hon Thom island, an ideal spot for snorkeling, swimming, and sightseeing
Admire the panoramic perspective of the archipelago, making for a memorable experience when riding the Hon Thom Cable Car
Savor delicious seafood at beachfront restaurants and explore the vibrant night market

itinerary.title: Romantic Arrival in Phu Quoc - Island Escape Begins
itinerary.description: As arriving at Phu Quoc International Airport, you will transfer to your hotel and carry on the check-in process. Spend the day relaxing, getting familiar with the surroundings, enjoying the beautiful beaches, and taking a dip in the clear turquoise waters. Phu Quoc Arrival

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc 3 Islands Snorkeling Full Day
itinerary.description:
At around 09:00, we will drive you and your partner to An Thoi port. When being on a boat and heading out to the island, you will listen to our tour guide explaining a lot about the stunning islands, neighborhood fishing boats, and the intriguing way of life of the neighborhood fisherman. Here are specific things that you can enjoy:

Swim in the glistening blue seas off a gorgeous white beach at Finger Nails Island

Go snorkeling at Dam Ngang Island. Prepare to view some of the coral reefs and fish that are the brightest you have ever seen

Have lunch on board with delectable Vietnamese tradit...

itinerary.title: Sightseeing in The South - Hon Thom Island full day
itinerary.description: At around 08:30, begin our sightseeing journey to the most well-known attractions in Phu Quoc. Ngoc Hien Pearl Farm: Learn more about the cultured pearl industry and listen to interesting stories about the pearl-making process on the island. Be amazed by the stunning variety of pearls in different hues and uncover the secrets behind their creation. Tranh Stream (available from May to October): A stunning place embraced by lush greenery and cascading waterfalls. Here, you can bask in the tranquil natural setting or immerse yourself in the refreshing stream

itinerary.title: Leisurely Day in Phu Quoc for Two - Unwind in Island Bliss
itinerary.description:
This day is free for couples to explore anything they like on Phu Quoc Island. Here are some recommendations:

Northern Phu Quoc – Rach Vem Village Full Day	From US $78/ pax
Northern Phu Quoc Motorbike Tour Full Day	From US $80/ pax
Phu Quoc Romantic Evening - Private boat	From US $125/ pax

Free Day To Explore Phu Quoc On Your Own

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc Departure
itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out from your hotel and spend some free time on your own. Then, transfer to Phu Quoc International Airport for your onward journey.

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with air-conditioning (AC) at hotel.
All transport during a tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
All in-tour stationed local English-speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
